title: [SCHOLAR] Follow-up on Administrative Appeals (72-Hour Pulse)
description: Initiate the 'Administrative Convergence' sequence by following up on the financial and academic appeals. If no response within 72 hours, trigger the provided phone script. Update administrative status in current_context.json.

title: [STRATEGY] Engage Daily Feedback Loop (The Judge)
description: Engage 'The Judge' to analyze system logs daily and provide tactical adjustments to Antigravity's autonomy levels and resource allocation. Monitor productivity trends versus mental health metrics.

title: [SCHOLAR] Deep Credit Audit & Roadmap Alignment (Post-MTA Access)
description: Engage the 'Scholar' role to perform a deep credit audit and academic roadmap alignment once MTA email access is secured.
